# mpbarbosa.com

> Personal portfolio and developer hub for Marcelo Pereira Barbosa (mpb) — software developer with 25+ years of experience, focused on AI-assisted development, automation, and JavaScript/TypeScript tooling. Based in São Paulo, Brazil.

## Active mission: ai_workflow

- [ai_workflow](https://github.com/mpbarbosa/ai_workflow): Automation layer that makes AI-assisted development reliable — so teams can trust what any AI coding tool generates before it ships. v4.3.0 · 111 modules · 23-step pipeline · 100% test coverage · supports Copilot, Cursor, Claude, and all major AI coding tools.
- [Back this mission on Singularity](https://singularity.diy): Public blockchain fundraising — investors back the mission through tradable tokens, no equity required.

## Projects

- [Onde Estou?](https://mpbarbosa.com/guia_js/): Real-time geolocation app built with AI-assisted development
- [Music in Numbers](https://mpbarbosa.com/music_in_numbers/src/music_in_numbers.html): Spotify data analysis
- [Monitora Vagas](https://mpbarbosa.com/monitora_vagas/public/): Hotel vacancy monitoring
- [MapaSP](https://mpbarbosa.com/mapasp/): Interactive map of São Paulo
- [mpb_scripts](https://github.com/mpbarbosa/mpb_scripts): Linux shell utility scripts

## About

Marcelo Pereira Barbosa · São Paulo, Brazil · 25+ years in software development · focus: AI tooling, JavaScript/TypeScript, automation, geolocation.

- GitHub: https://github.com/mpbarbosa
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mpbarbosa/
